event: View of Constantinople and the Bosporus at sunset
description: A panoramic view of Constantinople's harbor along the Bosporus at sunset. Tall-masted sailing ships are moored at the waterfront, where clusters of people move along the embankment. A domed mosque with twin minarets rises on the right side. The sky is suffused with warm golden and pink light reflecting off the calm water, with the distant silhouette of the city skyline visible across the strait.

_meta.title: View of Constantinople and the Bosporus
